creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text:
Today I updated ports tree from ports 9aa49f27ffd0 (committed on April 7) to ports 7f2e164a4b3b (committed on April 12) and got same build error on 13.0-RELEASE amd64 with NATIVECOMP option enabled.

https://people.freebsd.org/~yasu/poudriere/data/logs/bulk/130amd64-default-emacs/2022-04-12_17h00m39s/logs/emacs-devel-nox-29.0.50.20220331_1,2.log

Since editors/emacs-devel itself isn't changed, it seems change of dependeding ports causes the error. But it conflicts with that reporter reported the issue on March 31.
